7efb79e4a21796d910a420710f2be2b7dec67b7d.text:
I am excited to apply for the Software Engineer position at Reddit, where I can utilize my strong background in Full-Stack Development, Machine Learning, and Data Analytics to contribute to the development of scalable and reliable solutions. As a Computer Science undergraduate at Anurag University, I have gained hands-on experience in building scalable applications, optimizing ML models, and developing real-world AI solutions.

Throughout my academic journey, I have worked on various projects that demonstrate my technical skills and ability to deliver high-quality solutions. For instance, I developed a real-time collaborative platform called Collab Sphere, which enables multiple users to draw and interact simultaneously. I also built a full-stack music streaming application called Synthesia Music Player, which features secure authentication and authorization, mood-based playlist recommendations, and a custom audio player with a responsive UI.

In addition to my project experience, I have also gained valuable skills through internships and virtual experience programs. As a Machine Learning Intern at Skillfied Mentor, I built and trained ML models on real-world datasets using Python, achieving improved prediction accuracy by 12-18% through optimization. I am confident that my technical background, combined with my passion for software development and machine learning, makes me a strong fit for this role.

I am impressed by Reddit's commitment to building a community of communities and its focus on delivering high-quality solutions that meet stakeholders' needs. I am excited about the opportunity to collaborate with cross-functional partners and contribute to the development of cutting-edge technologies. I am confident that my skills and experience align well with the requirements of this role, and I look forward to the opportunity to discuss my application further.
